usage_descriptor_t(3) Library Functions Manual usage_descriptor_t(3)

NAME

usage_descriptor_t - Usage line descriptor for programmatic USAGE generation.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/builder.h>

Data Fields


const char * mode
NULL or mode name (e.g., server")or<mode>placeholder. const char * positional
NULL or positional args (e.g., [bind-addr]",<session-string>). bool show_options
true = show [options...]"suffix const char * description
Help text for this usage pattern.

Detailed Description

Usage line descriptor for programmatic USAGE generation.

Stores components separately so colors can be applied semantically:

  • mode: magenta
  • positional args: green
  • options: yellow

Definition at line 296 of file builder.h.

Field Documentation

const char* usage_descriptor_t::description

Help text for this usage pattern.
